Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: Mon ami, have you not had enough last time ? I have told you that I wish to focus on you ... err, besides the incident from a moment ago.

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: I truly do appreciate it, but I do not wish this to mean that I take away all l'attention from you and you are resigned to ...

Line.Text: Ahh, I did just encourage this, did I not ?
